title: Iranecio bulghardaghensis
intro: Iranecio bulghardaghensis is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Turkey. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Iranecio bulghardaghensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
taxonomy: Iranecio bulghardaghensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Turkey. Iranecio bulghardaghensis is a member of the genus Iranecio.
